plugins.name: product-dev
plugins.description: AI-assisted product development framework — vague idea to technical spec through structured UX research, hypothesis formation, and prototype planning. Ships 5 commands (/idea, /problem, /spec, /compile, /summary), 4 skills, and a tech-spec-writer subagent.

plugins.name: clownware-code-tools
plugins.description: Universal dev workflow skills — architecture/deployment-readiness auditing (/arch-audit), security auditing (/security-audit), test-suite auditing (/test-audit), Claude Code skill auditing (/skill-audit), design-system auditing (/design-audit), accessibility auditing (/a11y-audit), dependency auditing (/deps-audit), performance auditing (/perf-audit), devops/CI-CD auditing (/devops-audit), audit-fix application (/audit-fix), plugin releasing (/plugin-release), skill validation (/skill-validate), ADR authoring, PR descriptions, root-cause debugging, and test scaffolding — that probe the repo they run in and degrade gracefully. Plus a git guard hook: blocks --no-verify and secret-scans staged changes before every commit.

plugins.name: clownware-astro-tools
plugins.description: Astro + Preact stack skills — component scaffolding, template-aware PR descriptions, and performance-budget gate checks (/perf-budget-check) — following astro-performance-starter conventions with fallbacks for other Astro projects. Plus a format-on-edit hook that runs Biome on every file Claude edits in Biome-configured projects.

plugins.name: clownware-go-tools
plugins.description: Go + templ + sqlc stack skills — templ component scaffolding, table-driven test scaffolding, sqlc query scaffolding (/sqlc-query-scaffold), performance-budget gate checks (/perf-budget-check), and task-ci-aware PR descriptions — following go-performance-starter conventions with fallbacks for other Go projects. Plus a format-on-edit hook that runs goimports/gofmt and templ fmt on files Claude edits.

plugins.name: clownware-rust-tools
plugins.description: Rust stack skills — table-driven test scaffolding and CI-aware quality-gate checks (/gate-check: cargo fmt/clippy/test/deny and special CI legs) — following the tunes_protocol and gittunes workspace conventions with fallbacks for other Rust projects. Plus a format-on-edit hook that runs rustfmt (edition-detected) on files Claude edits.

plugins.name: pezza-design-system
plugins.description: The Pezza brand design system as a skill — design guidelines, color/type/spacing tokens, logo and photography assets, React component primitives, and two UI kit starters (web-app shell and DJ/producer site) — for generating on-brand interfaces, artifacts, and production code.
